task_description: Build a complete, production-ready Klondike Solitaire HTML5 web game with canvas rendering, drag-and-drop, scoring, timer, daily challenges, achievements, unlockable themes, platform adapters for monetization, and automated test harness. All assets programmatically generated - no external dependencies.

verification.summary: All 627 test assertions pass (185 selftest + 244 domtest + 198 sdk-probes). Build generates 5 platform zips successfully (~45KB each). Tests exercise real game logic (deck shuffling, move validation, scoring, win detection, progression math, daily seeds, achievement conditions, adapter interfaces) and would fail if implementations were reverted.
